title: coccocypselum hirsutum var. glabrum
intro: Coccocypselum hirsutum var. glabrum, also known as the smooth-fruited pusley, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The leaves and stems of Coccocypselum hirsutum var. glabrum are known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes it is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
